_publications._publicationTitle: NF1 deficiency drives metabolic reprogramming in ER+ breast cancer.

_contextSnippet: The Nf1 IF, PS, and IFPS indels model "Nf1 deficiency" and induce aggressive, penetrant, multi-focal, ER/PR + mammary adenocarcinomas in both female and male rats
details: Nf1 IF, PS, and IFPS indels induce aggressive, penetrant, multi-focal, ER/PR+ mammary adenocarcinomas in both female and male rats
